alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification is required. This technical regulation outlines general labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs, which typically include ingredient lists, nutritional information (e.g., sodium), allergen declarations, and warnings. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life declaration for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification is required. This technical regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for food products and their declaration on labels. Specific periods and conditions must be verified by consulting the full regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged food stuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. All prepackaged food stuffs must comply with the general labelling requirements specified in GSO 9:2022. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full technical regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food products claiming to be Halal must comply with the general requirements specified in GSO 2055-1:2015. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full technical regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Mandatory expiration dates for food products must comply with GSO 150-1:2013. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full technical regulation.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits for various foodstuffs and food ingredients must be verified by consulting the full GSO 1016:2015 technical regulation.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must have technological justification and not present health risks.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell food products containing non-permitted additives.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Regulatory limits on food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All food businesses must comply.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell food products with contaminants exceeding regulatory limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Regulatory limits on contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All food businesses must comply.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in the list of ingredients on food labels for prepacked foods. Applies only to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prepacked food products must comply. Applies only to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Labeling is required if the concentration is 10 mg/kg or more.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Production, import, or sale is prohibited for specific foods. Verification required.. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale must be consulted.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use. Delisted color additives are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30).

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use. Prohibited substances are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189).

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, sesame. These nine major food allergens must be specifically labeled on packaged foods.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an action level for total aflatoxins in general foods.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - "Gluten-free" claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Defined standard for gluten content. Foods labeled "gluten-free" must meet a defined standard for gluten content, including compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Establishments must implement written procedures to control allergen cross-contact and ensure accurate allergen labeling, as per the CGMP & PC rule (21 CFR part 117).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Cochineal extract and carmine must be declared on the label of all food and cosmetic products.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The name of the food source of a major food allergen must appear in parentheses following the name of the ingredient.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of specific types of tree nuts, fish, and Crustacean shellfish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The type of tree nut, and the species of fish and Crustacean shellfish must be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. All products containing FD&C Yellow No. 5 must identify it on their labels.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Sulfiting agents must be declared on food labels when present in food and the concentration is ≥10 ppm total sulfites.

alerts.title: Added: Vietnam Allergen List - Mandatory Allergen Declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. A list of mandatory allergens requiring declaration on labels for processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must be verified from official regulations issued by the Ministry of Health / Vietnam Food Administration.

alerts.title: Removed: China Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required via GSFA database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the online database and its Preamble for specific provisions.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and CCCF established levels. Codex establishes Maximum Levels (MLs) for contaminants in food or feed commodities to protect human health, keeping levels as low as possible based on sound scientific evidence. The Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF) establishes and endorses these levels.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: New: Adherence to Code of Practice required for prevention and reduction. A specific Code of Practice (CXC 78-2017) exists for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxins in spices.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The EU Additives Database provides information on approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites, and process hygiene criteria for foods.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

Specific details must be verified by consulting the full regulation.

alerts.details: New: Verification required from the FSSAI Compendium of Food Additives Regulations.. Specific limits for food additives depend on the food category and the additive itself, as detailed in the FSSAI regulations.

alerts.details: New: Verification required from the FSSAI Compendium of Labelling and Display Regulations.. Covers general display and labelling rules for food products.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific provisions exist for the production, import, registration, and circulation of Dinitrogen Monoxide (N2O) as a food additive. Manufacturers must verify compliance with these detailed requirements.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Additive Limits - Dinitrogen Monoksida (N2O)

alerts.details: New: Verification required. Manufacturers of processed foods, including seasoning and snack products, must verify compliance with the numerous regulations specific to processed foods, including those defining food categories, which are foundational for applying specific limits and labelling requirements.

alerts.details: Old: Verification required for specific regulations pertaining to additives, microbiology, contaminants, salt/sodium, allergens, and labeling. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.details: New: Verification required under relevant regulations.

Verification of MHLW's positive list is required.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.details: New: Verification of specific limits is required as they vary by additive and food type. Consult 'Guidance Information on Requirements for Use of Food Additives'.
